plugins.name: cure-product-engineering
plugins.description: Complete product engineering skill library — 75 skills (domain-organized), 35 agents (engineering, product, marketing, business, data, security), 4 personas (cross-domain engagement archetypes), 11 rules, 9 output styles, multi-layer hooks with agent auto-triggering (12 events), bundled stdlib Python tooling, MCP + LSP servers. Standards for Android, iOS, Web, Firebase, Python, Go, Rust, Docker, Terraform, and cloud infrastructure.
